ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response shows empathy and understanding of the player's urgency but lacks some naturalness in phrasing, slightly affecting persona consistency.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>This arm maintains a consistent persona as an ethical priest and provides clear advice without contextual cues but could improve in relevance to the current situation's urgency.
